mapper.insert: insert into chat_room_members(room_id, member_id, join_time) values (#{id.roomId}, #{id.memberId}, #{joinTime})
insert into chat_room_members(room_id, member_id, join_time) values (#{roomId}, #{memberId}, #{joinTime})
mapper.select:
SELECT cm.room_id, u.user_id, u.username, u.avatar FROM chat_room_members cm LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON cm.member_id = u.user_id WHERE cm.room_id IN
#{roomId}
